issues.title: PRODUCT.md still contains unresolved placeholders
issues.explanation: PRODUCT.md still contains unresolved placeholders
issues.suggestedFix: Replace placeholder brackets, TODO/TBD, ellipses, and generic coming-soon copy with concrete product decisions before implementation.

issues.title: DESIGN.md needs a brief-inferred Design Read
issues.explanation: DESIGN.md needs a brief-inferred Design Read
issues.suggestedFix: Add a Design Read that states page kind, audience, visual language, and aesthetic or design-system direction before implementation.

issues.title: DESIGN.md needs explicit taste controls
issues.explanation: DESIGN.md needs explicit taste controls
issues.suggestedFix: Add DESIGN_VARIANCE, MOTION_INTENSITY, and VISUAL_DENSITY values from 1 to 10.

issues.title: DESIGN.md needs a design-system decision
issues.explanation: DESIGN.md needs a design-system decision
issues.suggestedFix: Declare the design foundation: official design system, existing system, or bespoke CSS/Tailwind direction. Avoid mixing systems.

issues.title: DESIGN.md needs pre-flight proof before implementation
issues.explanation: DESIGN.md needs pre-flight proof before implementation
issues.suggestedFix: Add a pre-flight checklist that confirms design read, dials, responsive rules, accessibility, states, and security display rules.

issues.title: DESIGN.md needs an explicit typography scale
issues.explanation: DESIGN.md needs an explicit typography scale
issues.suggestedFix: Add a typography scale that defines display, headline, title, body, label, helper, and error text sizes instead of ad hoc text sizes.

issues.title: DESIGN.md needs text hierarchy roles
issues.explanation: DESIGN.md needs text hierarchy roles
issues.suggestedFix: Define named text roles with sizes and usage rules, such as display, h1, h2, body, label, helper text, and validation error text.

issues.title: Problems must use Root Cause Mode before implementation
issues.explanation: Problems must use Root Cause Mode before implementation
issues.suggestedFix: Add a Root Cause Mode section: reproduce the issue, separate symptoms from cause, identify the smallest root fix, and define verification proof.

issues.title: Agent handoff should include an Install Agent Harness inventory
issues.explanation: Agent handoff should include an Install Agent Harness inventory
issues.suggestedFix: Add an Install Agent Harness section. Ask the agent to inspect the project and recommend only the missing tools or skills needed now, with priority and reason.

issues.title: React projects should consider runtime safety harness tools
issues.explanation: React projects should consider runtime safety harness tools
issues.suggestedFix: For React or Next UI work, consider runtime error boundary and React health-check harnesses when runtime failures are likely.

issues.title: Modal, popup, drawer, or overlay needs an explicit viewport contract
issues.explanation: Modal, popup, drawer, or overlay needs an explicit viewport contract
issues.suggestedFix: Add a viewport contract that proves the overlay fits inside the visual viewport on mobile, desktop, landscape, and keyboard-open states.

issues.title: Overlay needs max-width or dynamic width guard
issues.explanation: Overlay needs max-width or dynamic width guard
issues.suggestedFix: Define max-width, width:min(...), clamp(...), inset spacing, or equivalent responsive width rules for every overlay shell.

issues.title: Overlay needs max-height or dynamic viewport height guard
issues.explanation: Overlay needs max-height or dynamic viewport height guard
issues.suggestedFix: Define max-height using dynamic viewport units such as 100dvh or 100svh, or an equivalent bounded height rule.

issues.title: Long overlay content needs internal scroll behavior
issues.explanation: Long overlay content needs internal scroll behavior
issues.suggestedFix: Add overflow-y-auto, overflow-auto, overscroll-contain, or a documented scrollable modal body area.

issues.title: Overlay appears to scroll the shell or expose a native scrollbar
issues.explanation: Overlay appears to scroll the shell or expose a native scrollbar
issues.suggestedFix: Do not let the modal shell expose a large native scrollbar. Keep the shell fixed inside the viewport and scroll only the content pane with a restrained scrollbar treatment.

issues.title: Overlay needs viewport QA proof
issues.explanation: Overlay needs viewport QA proof
issues.suggestedFix: Add QA proof for 320x568, 375x667, 390x844, landscape, keyboard-open state, no clipping, and no horizontal overflow.

issues.title: Stacked UI needs a placement plan before implementation
issues.explanation: Stacked UI needs a placement plan before implementation
issues.suggestedFix: Add a stacking or placement plan that explains what must appear above what and why.

issues.title: Layered UI needs a stacking context audit
issues.explanation: Layered UI needs a stacking context audit
issues.suggestedFix: Audit ancestors for transform, opacity, filter, contain, isolation, will-change, overflow clipping, fixed, and sticky positioning.

issues.title: Layered UI needs a named layer scale
issues.explanation: Layered UI needs a named layer scale
issues.suggestedFix: Define layer tokens for base content, sticky headers, dropdowns, drawers, modals, toasts, and alerts.

issues.title: Overlays need an explicit portal or top-layer policy
issues.explanation: Overlays need an explicit portal or top-layer policy
issues.suggestedFix: State whether overlays render in local DOM, a portal root, document body, native dialog top layer, or another overlay root.

issues.title: Layered UI needs a conflict matrix
issues.explanation: Layered UI needs a conflict matrix
issues.suggestedFix: Add a conflict matrix for header, dropdown, drawer, modal, tooltip, toast, and global alert ordering.

issues.symptom: Complex UI framework detected without explicit UI engineering guards.
issues.fixStrategy: Activate the `frontend-ui-engineering` skill to ensure production-quality components and state management.
issues.verificationProof: Agent acknowledges and utilizes the frontend-ui-engineering skill

issues.symptom: Web project detected. Agent lacks live browser validation.
issues.fixStrategy: Activate the `chrome-devtools` skill or `browser-testing-with-devtools` to allow the agent to run and inspect the app locally.
issues.verificationProof: Agent acknowledges and utilizes the chrome-devtools skill

issues.symptom: High risk of inaccessible modals, missing ARIA tags, and bad contrast.
issues.fixStrategy: Activate the `a11y-debugging` skill so the agent can use Chrome DevTools to audit accessibility properly.
issues.verificationProof: Agent acknowledges and utilizes the a11y-debugging skill

summary.readinessMessage: Do not hand this to an AI coding agent yet. Resolve errors and blocked source issues first.
